high_level_description: A wide 16:9 header illustration for a technology blog post about Kubernetes GitOps, showing friendly flat-design server racks in a clean data-center corridor with soft blue and amber LED glow.

style_description.aesthetics: clean flat vector illustration, technology blog hero image, minimal, organized
style_description.lighting: soft ambient blue and amber LED glow, no harsh shadows
style_description.art_style: flat vector art with crisp shapes, subtle gradients, and a modern tech editorial feel

compositional_deconstruction.background: Soft gradient from dark blue at the top to light grey at the bottom, subtle data-center ceiling lights receding into perspective down a tidy corridor.

elements.desc: A tall friendly server rack with rounded corners, soft blue metal, amber and green status LEDs arranged in a grid, placed in the left third.
A glowing Git branch and merge icon made of thick white lines, floating in the center of the corridor.
Floating geometric cubes and rectangles representing containers and microservices, in blue and amber, in the right third.
